layout.sidebar_description: Complete setup once, run one local job at a time, and manage generated timeline packages from the jobs view.
layout.update_detected: An updated app version was detected. Reloading...
index.header.title: Create A New Job
index.header.description: Complete Hugging Face / pyannote setup first, then choose video files or a directory and start a job.
index.setup.title: Check Settings First
index.active.title: Currently Running
index.active.none_description: When a job starts, a progress summary appears here.
index.form.files.title: Choose Files
index.form.files.description: You can select multiple video files at once.
index.form.directory.title: Choose A Directory
index.form.directory.description: On Edge / Chrome-based browsers you can choose a directory and send the videos under it.
index.form.select_input: Select video files or a directory.
index.form.cache_notice: Uploaded videos are treated as temporary cache. They are deleted 10 minutes after a job completes or fails, and immediately when the run is deleted.
index.history.title: Completed Jobs
index.history.description: Completed runs can be downloaded as ZIP files. Unneeded runs can be deleted.
index.history.empty: There are no completed jobs yet.
settings.header.description: Save the Hugging Face token and confirm the gated-model terms here before creating any jobs.
settings.notice.title: Using this model requires approval on Hugging Face.
settings.notice.description: Save the token first, then approve access from the pyannote model page.
settings.token_hint: Leave this blank to keep the saved token. Enter a new token only when you want to replace it.
settings.terms_label: Save that you confirmed the pyannote gated model terms
settings.compute_mode.title: Processing Mode
settings.compute_mode.description: Choose the preferred execution device for local processing. GPU mode requires NVIDIA Docker GPU support and falls back to CPU if unavailable.
settings.compute_mode.cpu_note: Most compatible. Slower on large jobs.
settings.compute_mode.gpu_note: Faster when NVIDIA GPU access is available to the worker.
settings.save_success: Settings saved. You can create a new job now.
settings.token_required: Enter a Hugging Face token before continuing.
settings.terms_required: Confirm the gated-model terms before continuing.
settings.save_blocked: Complete the required setup fields before continuing.
settings.save_pending: Settings were saved, but setup is not complete yet.
settings.appearance.title: Theme
settings.appearance.description: Switch between the application-shell themes here. The selected theme is stored in local browser storage.
jobs.new.description: Choose video files or a directory, then execute a single local processing job.
jobs.new.files_description: Select one or more local video files.
jobs.new.directory_description: Use a browser-supported directory picker to queue all videos under one folder.
jobs.new.cache_notice: Uploaded videos are treated as temporary cache. They are deleted 10 minutes after a job completes or fails, and immediately when the run is deleted.
jobs.new.select_input: Select video files or a directory before executing.
jobs.new.upload_waiting: Files are uploaded in chunks first, then the processing job is created.
jobs.list.description: See the current active run and manage completed job packages.
jobs.list.empty: There are no completed or failed jobs yet.
jobs.active.title: Active Run
jobs.active.heading: Current Processing
jobs.active.description: Only one job runs at a time. Open the detailed progress page if you need the full live status.
jobs.active.empty: There is no active job right now.
error.subtitle: An error occurred while processing your request.
error.development_description: Switching to the Development environment displays detailed information about the error that occurred.
error.development_warning: Do not enable the Development environment for deployed applications. It can expose sensitive exception details to end users. For local debugging, set ASPNETCORE_ENVIRONMENT to Development and restart the app.
privacy.description: Use this page to describe how uploaded files, generated output, tokens, and temporary cache are handled.
access.authorized: Access to the pyannote model is available.
access.consent_pending: Model consent has not been confirmed yet.
access.unauthorized: The token is saved, but model approval has not been applied yet.
